support-threads.description: MCP server for support tickets API - provides tools for managing support threads

tools.name: create_support_thread
tools.description: Create a new support thread with an initial message

tools.name: create_support_message
tools.description: Add a new message to an existing support thread

tools.name: close_support_thread
tools.description: Close a support thread (change status to closed)

tools.name: get_support_threads
tools.description: Get a paginated list of support threads with optional status filter. The "status" parameter accepts string values: "active" (integer 0) or "closed" (integer 1). If omitted, returns threads with any status.

tools.name: get_support_thread_by_id
tools.description: Get a full support thread with all its messages

http-endpoint.description: HTTP Streamable MCP endpoint - accessible via HTTP POST/GET requests
